infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Gundruk uses your camera to let you take photos and record videos to share as posts, reels, and stories, and to capture profile pictures.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Gundruk needs access to your photo library so you can select photos and videos to share as posts, reels, and stories.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Gundruk saves photos and videos you create or download to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Gundruk uses your location to show you nearby people and content in Find Vibe.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Gundruk uses your contacts to help you find friends who are already on Gundruk.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Gundruk uses your microphone to record audio when you capture videos and reels to share with others.
